scripts.vpatch: npm version patch && npm publish --access public
scripts.build:iife: npx cross-env NODE_ENV=$NODE_ENV npx esbuild index.js --bundle --target=es2020 --format=iife --global-name=DomqlPerformance --outfile=dist/iife/index.js --define:process.env.NODE_ENV=process.env.NODE_ENV
scripts.build: npx rimraf dist && npm run build:esm && npm run build:cjs && npm run build:iife
scripts.prepublish: npm run build && npm run copy:package:cjs
